$comment: Machine-readable companion to docs/radix-reference.md and docs/radix-workflow.md: the closed Radix vocabulary an agent maps a natural-language UI request onto deterministically. radix.catalog.test.ts pins the two sections backed by code -- the icon list against icons.ts, and each theme.config.ts value against its props.*.values list -- so those cannot silently drift. The rest (components, componentProps, layoutProps, templatePrimitives, statusColors, gaps) mirrors docs/radix-reference.md by hand and is prose-authoritative: change one, change both.

products.name: Themes
products.role: default styled UI layer (components + <Theme> provider + tokens)

products.name: Primitives
products.role: unstyled accessible behavior, composed only for the documented Themes gaps

products.name: Colors
products.role: 12-step scales; touched only for a custom brand hex

products.name: Icons
products.role: 15x15 currentColor glyph set; consumed via the icons.ts allow-list

theme.note: One <Theme> configures the whole app. An NL restyle maps to a single edit here; the configure-theme skill owns the procedure. Never add `appearance` (light/dark is driven by the .dark class).

appearance.note: Driven by the .dark class on <html> (ThemeProvider + pre-hydration script). Passing this prop reintroduces a load flash.

customBrandColor.note: Escape hatch for a specific brand hex no built-in hue matches: a renamed 12-step scale scoped to .radix-themes / .dark. The configure-theme skill (Path B) owns the recipe.

variant.note: The exact set varies per component; Button/Badge/Card support most.

size.note: Common control scale. Typography (Text/Heading) and some layout props extend to "9". Use size "3"+ on interactive elements for >=44px touch targets.

color.note: Overrides the theme accent for one element.

radius.note: Per-element override of the global radius.

layoutProps.responsiveSyntax: object per prop, e.g. direction={{ initial: "column", md: "row" }}

templatePrimitives.note: interface/src/components/ui/* -- thin wrappers that pin the template's public API over a Themes component. Use these in pages; reach for the bare Themes component when a wrapper does not exist.

sections.note: interface/src/components/sections/* -- composite blocks composing primitives + Themes layout.

statusColors.note: Semantic status maps to Radix hues (the replacement for old text-success/-warning/-destructive tokens). Apply via the `color` prop, the Badge `tone`, or the Button `variant`.

icons.note: Closed set. Add a glyph to icons.ts before using it; broadening past Radix Icons (e.g. lucide-react) is an approval-gated dependency swap. This list is asserted equal to icons.ts by radix.catalog.test.ts.

gaps.note: Not in Themes -- compose from unstyled radix-ui primitives + Theme tokens (var(--accent-9), Text/Flex/Box). This is an add-component gap task, not a Themes-config task.
